CREATE TYPE complex EXTERNAL NAME complex_type;
CREATE TABLE operations AS SELECT n1.num AS num1, n2.num AS num2 FROM numbers n1 JOIN numbers n2 ON n1.num != n2.num;
SELECT num1, num2, num1 + num2 AS sum FROM operations;
CREATE TYPE json_data EXTERNAL NAME json_type;
CREATE TABLE messages (id INT, content json_data);
INSERT INTO messages VALUES (2, '{"message": "MonetDB is awesome!"}');
CREATE TYPE point EXTERNAL NAME point_type;
SELECT p, p + point(1, 1) AS moved_point FROM points;
CREATE TABLE point_operations AS SELECT p1.p AS point1, p2.p AS point2 FROM points p1 JOIN points p2 ON p1.p != p2.p;
SELECT point1, point2, point_distance(point1, point2) AS distance FROM point_operations;
CREATE TYPE avro_record EXTERNAL NAME avro_type;
CREATE TABLE user_data (user_id INT, data avro_record);
SELECT user_id, data->'name' AS username FROM user_data;
CREATE TABLE json_operations AS SELECT user_id, data->'age' AS age FROM user_data WHERE (data->'age')::INT > 20;
SELECT AX, BX, AX + BX AS total FROM (SELECT data->'value1' AS AX, data->'value2' AS BX FROM some_table WHERE some_condition) AS derived;
